cgu.title: Terms of Service
cgu.warning: ⚠️ By registering on YumiScan, you acknowledge having read and accepted all of these Terms of Service. These TOS constitute a legally binding contract between you and the Publisher of the Application.
cgu.art1_title: Article 1 — Purpose and presentation of the service
cgu.art1_p1: The YumiScan application (hereinafter "the Application") is a digital service published and operated by YumiScan (hereinafter "the Publisher"), whose purpose is to allow the user to photograph or import an image of an ingredient list in order to obtain an automated analysis intended to identify the ingredients and potential allergens present in a food product.
cgu.art1_p2: The Application provides informative assistance only. It does not under any circumstances constitute medical, nutritional, dietary or health advice. The results produced by the Application cannot replace a careful reading of a product's packaging, nor a medical consultation or the advice of a healthcare professional.
cgu.art2_p1: Access to certain features of the Application requires:
cgu.art2_l1: The creation of a user account with a valid email address and a secure password;
cgu.art2_l2: The express prior acceptance of these TOS;
cgu.art2_l3: The express acceptance of the health and allergen warning;
cgu.art2_l4: The possession of sufficient scan credits (free upon registration or purchased).
cgu.art2_p2: The user guarantees that the information provided during registration is accurate, complete, and up to date. The Publisher reserves the right to suspend or delete any account whose information proves to be incorrect or whose use is contrary to these TOS.
cgu.art2_p3: The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials and any use made of their account.
cgu.art3_title: Article 3 — Operation of the scanning service
cgu.art3_p1: The scanning service relies on a multi-step technical pipeline including:
cgu.art3_l1: The reception and processing of the image provided by the user;
cgu.art3_l2: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) to extract text from the image;
cgu.art3_l3: The analysis of the extracted text by an artificial intelligence model (Google Gemini);
cgu.art3_l4: The classification of detected ingredients against the allergens and dietary criteria specified by the user in their profile.
cgu.art3_l5: The quality and reliability of the result depend directly on the quality of the image provided (sharpness, lighting, angle, resolution);
cgu.art3_l6: No automated system, regardless of its sophistication, is free from errors;
cgu.art3_l7: Some ingredients may be poorly detected, partially detected, omitted or misinterpreted;
cgu.art3_l8: Foreign language labels, especially Japanese, are subject to the same limitations as any label, despite the specific optimization of the service;
cgu.art3_l9: A credit is consumed as soon as the processing is effectively launched, regardless of the result obtained.
cgu.art4_p1: The Application allows the user to indicate in their profile the allergens and dietary criteria they wish to monitor (gluten, soy, eggs, crustaceans, peanuts, tree nuts, sesame, milk, fish, halal, vegan, etc.).
cgu.art4_p2: The user expressly acknowledges and unreservedly accepts that:
cgu.art4_l1: The Application does not guarantee the exhaustive detection of all allergens present in a product;
cgu.art4_l1_strong: The Application does not guarantee the exhaustive detection of all allergens
cgu.art4_l2: Some substances may be absent from the analysis, ambiguous, misspelled on the source label, or misinterpreted by the algorithms;
cgu.art4_l3: Allergens present as traces, derivatives, or scientific names may not be identified;
cgu.art4_l4: The Application in no way replaces the careful human reading of the product's original packaging;
cgu.art4_l5: In the case of a severe, life-threatening allergy or one requiring absolute vigilance, the Application must not be used as the sole verification tool.
cgu.art4_l5_strong: must not be used as the sole verification tool
cgu.art5_p1: Within the limits authorized by applicable legislation, in particular the French Civil Code and European consumer law, the Publisher cannot be held liable, directly or indirectly, for damages of any kind (bodily, material, financial, moral) resulting from:
cgu.art5_l1: An error, inaccuracy, or omission in the analysis results provided by the Application;
cgu.art5_l2: A misinterpretation by the user of the displayed results;
cgu.art5_l3: An allergic reaction, a health incident, or bodily injury following the consumption of a food product;
cgu.art5_l4: A temporary or permanent unavailability of the service;
cgu.art5_l5: A loss of data related to a technical malfunction;
cgu.art5_l6: A use of the Application contrary to these TOS.
cgu.art5_p2: The Application is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind, express or implied. The user remains solely responsible for their food consumption decisions, regardless of the results displayed by the Application.
cgu.art5_p2_strong: The user remains solely responsible for their food consumption decisions
cgu.art5_p3: In any event, the liability of the Publisher, if it were to be incurred, would be strictly limited to the amount of sums actually paid by the user to the Publisher during the twelve (12) months preceding the generating event.
cgu.art6_p1: It is strictly forbidden to use the Application:
cgu.art6_l1: For medical, diagnostic, therapeutic, or health counseling purposes;
cgu.art6_l2: As the sole verification tool for severe, serious, or potentially life-threatening allergies;
cgu.art6_l3: To make decisions involving the health of a third party, particularly a child or a vulnerable person, without additional human control;
cgu.art6_l4: For fraudulent, deceptive purposes or contrary to applicable legislation;
cgu.art6_l5: To attempt to access, by unauthorized means, the computer systems of the Publisher or its service providers;
cgu.art6_l6: To bypass or exploit the Application's credit mechanisms.
cgu.art7_p1: The Application uses probabilistic artificial intelligence models (Google Gemini). The user acknowledges and accepts that:
cgu.art7_l1: The results are generated automatically by algorithms and are not manually verified by the Publisher;
cgu.art7_l2: AI models can produce incomplete, approximate, inaccurate, or erroneous results, including "hallucinations" (invented information);
cgu.art7_l3: The AI may produce false negatives (allergens present but not detected) or false positives (allergens falsely reported as present);
cgu.art7_l4: The Publisher offers no guarantee of absolute reliability, completeness, or accuracy of the analyses produced;
cgu.art7_l5: In accordance with the European AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689), the Application is used as a decision support tool and not as a high-impact automated decision-making system.
cgu.art8_p1: The Application operates on a credit system. Each user receives free credits upon registration. Additional credits can be purchased via the Stripe payment platform.
cgu.art8_p1_l1: A credit is definitively consumed as soon as the {launch}, regardless of the quality or completeness of the result obtained;
cgu.art8_p1_l2: Purchased credits {no_refund}, except where mandatory legal provisions state otherwise;
cgu.art8_p1_l4: In the event of a dispute related to a payment, the user must contact the Publisher through the {contactPage} before any chargeback procedure;
cgu.art8_l1: A credit is definitively consumed as soon as the scan processing is actually launched, regardless of the quality or completeness of the result obtained;
cgu.art8_l2: Purchased credits are non-refundable, except where mandatory legal provisions state otherwise;
cgu.art8_l3: Credits do not expire and remain valid as long as the user account is active;
cgu.art8_l4: In the event of a payment-related dispute, the user must contact the Publisher through the Contact page before initiating any chargeback procedure;
cgu.art8_l5: Any attempted fraud, abuse, or unjustified chargeback will result in the immediate suspension of the account and may lead to prosecution.
cgu.art8_p2: Payments are processed exclusively by Stripe Inc., which is PCI-DSS level 1 certified. The Publisher does not store any credit card data.
cgu.art9_p1: The user can delete their account at any time from the "My Account" page. Deletion leads to the permanent loss of the scan history and remaining credits, with no right to a refund.
cgu.art9_p2: The Publisher reserves the right, without notice or compensation, to suspend or delete any account in the event of:
cgu.art9_l2: Fraudulent use of the service or credits;
cgu.art9_l4: Provision of false information during registration;
cgu.art9_l5: Abusive behavior towards the service or its providers.
cgu.art10_title: Article 10 — Applicable law and competent jurisdiction
cgu.art10_p1: These TOS are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute relating to their interpretation or execution, and failing an amicable resolution within thirty (30) days from the notification of the dispute through the {contactPage}, the parties will submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent French courts.
cgu.art10_p2: In accordance with Articles L. 611-1 et seq. of the Consumer Code, a user acting as a consumer has the right to use a consumer mediator free of charge for the amicable resolution of the dispute.
cgu.art10_p3: The Publisher reserves the right to modify these TOS at any time. In the event of a substantial modification, the user will be informed by email and must accept the new version to continue using the service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: GDPR Compliant (EU Regulation 2016/679) — Last updated: {date}
privacy.art1_p1: The data controller is the natural or legal person who determines the purposes and means of processing personal data. For any questions regarding your data, you can contact us at the address above.
privacy.art2_p1: The table below summarizes all processed data, their purpose, and their legal basis under Article 6 of the GDPR:

data_account.title: Account Data
data_account.data_val: Email address, first name, last name
data_account.purpose_val: User account creation and management, authentication
data_account.retention_val: Account lifetime + 3 years after deletion (legal obligations)

data_preferences.title: Allergen Preferences
data_preferences.legal_basis_val: Contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) — Since this data relates to health, its processing also relies on explicit consent (Art. 9.2.a GDPR)

data_images.title: Scan Images
data_images.data_val: Photos or images of food labels imported by the user
data_images.purpose_val: OCR and AI analysis to detect ingredients and allergens
data_images.retention_val: 24 months from the scan date, then automatic deletion
data_images.access_val: Stored in a private Supabase bucket, accessible only by the owning user

data_results.title: Scan Results and History
data_results.data_val: List of extracted ingredients, detected allergens, date and time of scan
data_results.legal_basis_val: Contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR)

data_payment.title: Payment Data
data_payment.legal_basis_val: Contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and legal obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR)
data_payment.note_val: Bank card data is processed exclusively by Stripe. YumiScan does not store any card numbers.

data_consent.title: Consent Log
data_consent.data_val: Accepted TOS version, date and time of acceptance, health warning acceptance
data_consent.retention_val: 5 years from the date of acceptance

privacy.art3_p1: YumiScan uses the following service providers to deliver the service. Each provider acts as a subcontractor and only processes data necessary for its function:
privacy.provider_supabase_desc: User data storage, authentication, scan images. Data hosted in the EU (eu-west).
privacy.provider_google_desc: Image processing for OCR analysis and ingredient classification. Images are transmitted to the Google Gemini API for analysis and are not retained by Google beyond processing.
privacy.provider_stripe_desc: Secure payment processing, PCI-DSS Level 1 certified. YumiScan does not receive or store any credit card data.
privacy.provider_vercel_desc: Web application hosting. Standard navigation data (IP address, user-agent) may be temporarily logged for security purposes.
privacy.art4_title: 4. Data Transfers outside the European Union
privacy.art4_p1: Some providers (Vercel, Google Gemini, Stripe) may process data in countries outside the European Union, specifically in the United States. These transfers are governed by appropriate safeguards:
privacy.art4_l1: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission;
privacy.art4_l2: EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework certification, where applicable.
privacy.art4_p2: Data in the primary database (Supabase) is hosted within the European Union.
privacy.art5_p1: YumiScan uses the following types of cookies and trackers:
privacy.cookie_necessary_desc: Supabase authentication session. These cookies are essential for the application to function and cannot be disabled.
privacy.cookie_analytics_desc: Audience measurement tools (Google Analytics, etc.), activated only if you have given your consent. These cookies allow us to improve the user experience by analyzing service usage.
privacy.cookie_ads_desc: Advertising tracking pixels (Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Google Ads), activated only if you have given your consent. These trackers allow us to measure the effectiveness of our advertising campaigns.
privacy.art5_p2: You can modify your cookie preferences at any time via the "Cookie Management" link available at the bottom of the page. In accordance with CNIL recommendations, your consent is obtained prior to setting any non-essential cookies.
privacy.art6_p1: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.right_access_desc: (Art. 15): obtain confirmation that your data is being processed and receive a copy.
privacy.right_erasure_desc: (Art. 17): request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten").
privacy.right_restriction_desc: (Art. 18): request the suspension of your data processing.
privacy.right_portability_desc: (Art. 20): receive your data in a structured, readable format.
privacy.right_objection_desc: (Art. 21): object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.right_withdraw_desc: : withdraw your consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.
privacy.art6_p2: To exercise your rights: delete your account from the "My Account" page or contact us through the Contact page. We will respond within a maximum of one (1) month from receipt of your request.
privacy.art6_p3: In case of an unsatisfactory response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés): cnil.fr.
privacy.art7_p1: The Publisher implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:
privacy.art7_l2: Secure authentication managed by Supabase Auth;
privacy.art7_l3: Data isolation per user (Row-Level Security in the database);
privacy.art7_l4: Access to scan images restricted to the account owner;
privacy.art7_l5: Payments processed by Stripe (PCI-DSS Level 1 certified).
privacy.art7_p2: In the event of a data breach likely to cause a risk to your rights and freedoms, the Publisher commits to informing you as soon as possible in accordance with Article 34 of the GDPR.
privacy.art8_p1: This privacy policy may be updated to reflect changes in our practices or to comply with new legal obligations. In the event of a substantial change, you will be informed by email and/or via a notification in the Application. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of the document.

mentions.title: Legal Mentions
mentions.subtitle: In accordance with Articles 6-III and 19 of Law n° 2004-575 of June 21, 2004, on Confidence in the Digital Economy (LCEN)

cards.backend_p1: Data for EU residents is hosted in datacenters located in the European Union (eu-west region).

mentions.backend_p1: Data for EU residents is hosted in datacenters located in the European Union (eu-west region).
mentions.eu_data_notice: Data for EU residents is hosted in datacenters located in the European Union (eu-west region).
mentions.art3_p1: All elements constituting the YumiScan Application (texts, graphics, logotype, source code, database, architecture) are protected by French intellectual property provisions and, more generally, by any applicable international treaty.
mentions.art3_p2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, adaptation, or exploitation of all or part of the site's elements, regardless of the means or process used, is prohibited without prior written authorization from the Publisher. Any unauthorized exploitation may constitute an infringement subject to legal proceedings.
mentions.art4_p1: The processing of users' personal data is governed by the YumiScan Privacy Policy, accessible at any time from the footer of the Application.
mentions.art4_p2: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — Regulation (EU) 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act n° 78-17 of January 6, 1978, the user has the right to access, rectify, delete, limit processing, data portability, and object concerning their personal data.
mentions.art4_p3: To exercise these rights, use YumiScan’s Contact page.
mentions.art4_p4: In case of an unresolved complaint, the user may refer the matter to the CNIL (National Commission on Informatics and Liberty): cnil.fr.
mentions.art5_p1: YumiScan is an artificial intelligence-based dietary decision support tool. It does not constitute a medical device, a diagnostic tool, or a certified medical information source.
mentions.art5_p2: The Publisher cannot be held liable for direct or indirect damage resulting from the use of the service, particularly in the event of an analysis error, omission of an allergen, or a consumption decision made based on the displayed results.
mentions.art5_p3: Always check the physical packaging of the product in case of severe allergy or doubt.
mentions.art5_warning_title: Important: DO NOT solely rely on YumiScan in life-threatening situations.
mentions.art6_p1: The Application may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for informational purposes only. The Publisher has no control over the content of these sites and disclaims all liability for the information published therein.
mentions.art7_p1: These legal mentions are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and failing an amicable resolution, French jurisdictions will have exclusive competence.

warning.title: Health & Allergens Warning
warning.subtitle: Mandatory document — Read before use
warning.alert_title: ⚠️ Important Warning — Read carefully before using YumiScan
warning.alert_p1: YumiScan uses automated OCR (Optical Character Recognition) technologies and probabilistic artificial intelligence. These technologies, however advanced, do not guarantee exact, complete, or exhaustive results.

sections.limits_l1: The analysis depends on the quality of the image provided: a blurry, poorly framed, or poorly lit photo can lead to erroneous results.
sections.limits_l2: Certain ingredients may be omitted, poorly detected, or misinterpreted by algorithms, particularly when written in a foreign language, abbreviated, or in code form.
sections.limits_l3: Allergens present as traces, derivatives, or scientific names may not be identified.
sections.limits_l4: Artificial intelligence can produce false negatives (allergens present but not reported) or false positives (allergens reported but absent).
sections.limits_l5: No analysis is 100% guaranteed, regardless of the conditions.
sections.severe_p1: ❗ If you suffer from a severe allergy, anaphylaxis, or any food intolerance requiring absolute vigilance:
sections.severe_l1: Never rely solely on YumiScan to decide whether to consume a product.
sections.severe_l2: Always read the original product packaging and check the complete list of ingredients.
sections.severe_l3: If in doubt, refrain from consuming the product and consult a healthcare professional.
sections.severe_l4: The Application is not a medical device and is not certified as such.
sections.responsibility_p1: By using YumiScan, you acknowledge and agree that:
sections.responsibility_l1: The results provided are indicative information, not certifications.
sections.responsibility_l2: You use the Application at your own risk.
sections.responsibility_l3: You remain solely responsible for your dietary decisions, regardless of the results displayed.
sections.responsibility_l4: The Publisher of YumiScan cannot be held responsible for bodily, allergic, or health damage related to the use of the service.

warning.recs_l1: Use YumiScan as a first indication, never as the only source of verification.
warning.recs_l2: Make sure to take clear, well-lit, and readable photos.
warning.recs_l3: In case of a severe allergy, always check the physical label of the product.
warning.recs_l4: Consult your doctor or allergist for any medical questions relating to your allergies.
warning.footer: Document complying with ANSES recommendations and the requirements of Regulation (EU) n° 1169/2011 on the provision of food information to consumers. — YumiScan
